Item 1A. Risk Factors ........................... 12
Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments ............... 40
Item 2. Properties ............................. 41
Item 1A. Risk Factors
The following risk factors could materially and adversely affect our business, financial condition, and results of operations. You should carefully consider all of the risks described below before making an investment decision.
Our revenue is concentrated among a small number of customers, and the loss of any of them would harm our operating results.
A significant portion of our revenue is derived from a few large customers. If we lose one of these customers, or if such a customer reduces its purchases, our operating results would be materially and adversely affected. This concentration also exposes us to bargaining pressure on pricing and to payment risk over time.
We have a history of operating losses and may never achieve or sustain profitability.
We have incurred operating losses in each fiscal year since our inception and expect to continue to invest heavily in our operations. We may never achieve or sustain profitability, and our accumulated deficit may continue to grow for the foreseeable future as we pursue our growth strategy.
Substantial doubt may exist about our ability to continue as a going concern.
Our recurring losses from operations and negative cash flows raise substantial doubt about our ability to continue as a going concern within one year after the date these financial statements are issued. If we are unable to raise additional capital on acceptable terms, we may be forced to curtail or cease our operations.
Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments
None.
Item 2. Properties
Our corporate headquarters are located in Delaware under a long-term lease.
